footer.description: Polokalama atina'e amata fa'avae i Sarajevo, Bosnia. Matou te fausiaina polokalama fa'apitoa, AI / ML fofo, ao fausaga, ma otometi faiga.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Horizon Tech. Ua taofia aia tatau uma.

header.description: Mai le atina'eina o polokalama fa'apisinisi ma AI-powered business intelligence i ao atina'e ma IoT fofo - matou te tu'uina atu auaunaga fa'atekonolosi lautele e una'ia ai le fou ma fa'atelevave le tuputupu a'e.
header.trustedBy: Fa'atuatuaina e tagata fa'atau i luma
